name: drizzle-orm
summary: Lightweight TypeScript ORM with SQL-first design, zero magic, and edge-runtime support.

story.problem: Prisma's generated client adds bundle weight and requires a sidecar query engine. You want type-safe SQL queries that are transparent (you can see the SQL), work at the edge, and don't have a heavy codegen step.
story.mental_model: Drizzle is a thin TypeScript layer over SQL. You define tables as TypeScript objects, and queries look almost like SQL. `db.select().from(users).where(eq(users.id, 1))` compiles to `SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = 1`. No magic, no query engine — just your DB driver.
story.when_to_use: Edge runtimes (Cloudflare Workers, Vercel Edge), projects where you want full SQL control with types, lighter bundle size than Prisma, serverless environments.
story.when_not_to_use: If you prefer Prisma's schema-first DX and Studio. Complex ORM features like polymorphism. Teams more comfortable with ActiveRecord-style ORMs.

alternatives.name: prisma
alternatives.reason: More DX polish, visual Studio, better for traditional Node.js backends.

alternatives.name: kysely
alternatives.reason: Even more SQL-first, no schema definition layer, just a type-safe query builder.

alternatives.name: typeorm
alternatives.reason: Decorator-based, more features but heavier and less type-safe.

nodes.label: drizzle-orm
nodes.summary: Core package. Provides query builder and schema definition utilities.

nodes.label: Schema definition (pgTable / sqliteTable)
nodes.summary: Define tables as TS objects: `const users = pgTable('users', { id: serial('id').primaryKey() })`.

nodes.label: drizzle(driver)
nodes.summary: Create DB instance: `const db = drizzle(pool)`. Wraps your DB driver (pg, better-sqlite3, libsql).

nodes.label: db.update() / db.delete()
nodes.summary: Type-safe updates and deletes with where clauses.

nodes.label: relations() helper
nodes.summary: Define JS-side relations for query joins: `relations(users, ({ many }) => ({ posts: many(posts) }))`.

nodes.label: drizzle-kit migrate
nodes.summary: `drizzle-kit generate` creates SQL migration files from schema. `drizzle-kit push` for dev.

tasks.title: Define a schema and query it

steps.label: Install
steps.code:
npm install drizzle-orm pg
npm install -D drizzle-kit @types/pg

steps.label: Schema
Connect + query
Insert
